prompt:
Game: Light Warrior.
Asset ID: enemy.shadow_imp.
Small fast shadow imp enemy concept sheet for a UE5 third-person arena game. Angular violet-black living darkness body, jagged readable silhouette, glowing violet eyes, bright red-violet attack tell ring, hit-flash frame, and defeat frame where the body dissolves into reclaimed gold light. Include front view, side view, attack windup, hit feedback, defeat dissolve, and small gameplay camera thumbnail.
Global style rules: No text, logo, watermark, UI labels, or decorative frame inside generated images. Prioritize UE5 third-person gameplay readability over decorative micro-detail. Use the game world's reality: luminous guardian power, living darkness, sacred technology, resonance, etheric force, Tartaria-inspired restored architecture, and flat huge-world horizon logic. Hero reads as white-gold and dawn-blue. Enemies read as violet-black with red-violet danger tells. Restoration reads as warm gold and dawn-blue. Every output is a candidate until proven in a UE5 gameplay capture.
Avoid: text, letters, logo, watermark, gore, horror realism, muddy black blob, friendly mascot, tiny unreadable details, hidden attack tell.
review_gate: Imp must be distinct from the hero and the attack tell must be visible before damage.
